Experiment_1_climate

Dominic Rebindaine

2025-09-18

required packages

#####################
# Required packages #
#####################

require(ggplot2)
## Loading required package: ggplot2
require(tidyverse)
## Loading required package: tidyverse
## ── Attaching core tidyverse packages ──────────────────────── tidyverse 2.0.0 ──
## ✔ dplyr     1.1.4     ✔ readr     2.1.5
## ✔ forcats   1.0.0     ✔ stringr   1.5.1
## ✔ lubridate 1.9.4     ✔ tibble    3.3.0
## ✔ purrr     1.1.0     ✔ tidyr     1.3.1
## ── Conflicts ────────────────────────────────────────── tidyverse_conflicts() ──
## ✖ dplyr::filter() masks stats::filter()
## ✖ dplyr::lag()    masks stats::lag()
## ℹ Use the conflicted package (<http://conflicted.r-lib.org/>) to force all conflicts to become errors
require(readxl)
## Loading required package: readxl
require(parameters)
## Loading required package: parameters
require(broom)
## Loading required package: broom

plot theme

## Plotting preferences

plotTheme1 = theme(
  legend.position   = "right",
  legend.background = element_rect(fill=NA, linewidth=0.5, linetype="solid"),
  legend.text       = element_text(color="black", size = 18),
  legend.title      = element_text(color="black", size = 20),
  panel.background  = element_blank(),
  axis.text         = element_text(colour = "black", size = 20),
  axis.title        = element_text(colour = "black", size = 22),
  panel.border      = element_rect(colour = "black", fill=NA),
  axis.line         = element_line(color = "black"),
  strip.background  = element_rect(fill=NA),
  strip.text        = element_text(colour = 'black'),
  plot.title        = element_text(face="bold",hjust = 0.5))

set paths

#############################
## Set directory and paths ##
#############################


data.dir = '/Users/dominic/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Documents/PhD/development_2022_2023/analysis/experiment_1/data'
output.dir = '/Users/dominic/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Documents/PhD/development_2022_2023/analysis/experiment_1/figures'

data

#####################
# Load climate data #
#####################

outside.control = read_excel(paste(data.dir,'Hobo_outside_12.04_07.07.xlsx', sep = '/'))

outside.control = outside.control %>% 
  mutate(
    date = as.Date(date.time),
    time = format(as.POSIXct(date.time), "%H:%M"))


outside.control.container = read_excel(paste(data.dir,'Hobo_outside_container.xlsx', sep = '/'))

outside.control.container = outside.control.container %>% 
  mutate(
    date = as.Date(date.time),
    time = format(as.POSIXct(date.time), "%H:%M"))

Plots

#############################
## Plot ##
#############################

# Temperature

ggplot(filter(outside.control.container, date <= '2023-09-01'), aes(x = date.time, y = temp)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +  # Line plot for each Treatment
  labs(title = "Temperature Over Time",
       x = "Date-Time",
       y = "Temperature (°C)") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))  # Rotate x-axis labels
## Warning: Using `size` aesthetic for lines was deprecated in ggplot2 3.4.0.
## ℹ Please use `linewidth` instead.
## This warning is displayed once every 8 hours.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.

ggplot(outside.control, aes(x = date.time, y = temp)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +  # Line plot for each Treatment
  labs(title = "Temperature Over Time",
       x = "Date-Time",
       y = "Temperature (°C)") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))  # Rotate x-axis labels

# Light intensity

ggplot(outside.control, aes(x = date.time, y = lux)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +  # Line plot for each Treatment
  labs(title = "Lux Over Time",
       x = "Date-Time",
       y = "Lux") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))  # Rotate x-axis labels

# mean Lux each hour during July treatment
outside.control$group = 'group'

ggplot(filter(outside.control, date >= '2023-06-21' & date <= '2023-07-07'), aes(x = time, y = lux, group = group)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "line", size = 1) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_cl_normal, geom = "ribbon", alpha = 0.2) +
  labs(title = "Mean Lux 21/06/23 - 07/07/23",
       x = "Time",
       y = "Mean Lux") +
  theme_classic()

# mean Lux during July treatment
ggplot(filter(outside.control, date >= '2023-06-21' & date <= '2023-07-07' & time >= '06:00' & time <= '21:00'), 
       aes(x = group, y = lux)) +
  geom_boxplot(outliers = F) +
  labs(title = "Lux 06:00-21:00 21/06/23 - 07/07/23",
       x = "Outside control",
       y = "Lux") +
  theme_classic()

filter(outside.control, date >= '2023-06-21' & date <= '2023-07-07' & time >= '06:00' & time <= '21:00') %>% 
  summarise(mean.lux = mean(lux), sd.lux = sd(lux))
## # A tibble: 1 × 2
##   mean.lux sd.lux
##      <dbl>  <dbl>
## 1    6946. 12325.
#############################
## Soil water content ##
#############################

swc = read.csv(paste(data.dir,'SWC_measurements.csv', sep = '/'))

#names(swc) = c('id','group','number','cooling.level','lo.timing','treatment.timing',seq(1,8))

swc = pivot_longer(swc, 
  cols = c("X27.06.2023","X07.07.2023","X22.07.2023","X04.08.2023","X16.08.2023","X01.09.2023","X12.10.2023","X23.10.2023"),
  values_to = 'SWC', names_to = 'date') %>% 
  mutate(date = as.Date(sub('.','',date), format = "%d.%m.%Y"))

AverageSummarySWC = swc %>% 
  group_by(group,date) %>% 
  summarise(
    mean.swc = round(mean(SWC, na.rm = T),1),
    ci.lower.swc = round(mean.swc - 1.96*standard_error(SWC, na.rm = T),1),
    ci.upper.swc = round(mean.swc + 1.96*standard_error(SWC, na.rm = T),1))
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'group'. You can override using the
## `.groups` argument.
AverageSummarySWC %>% ggplot() +
  geom_line(aes(date, mean.swc, group = group, colour = group)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(x = date, ymin = AverageSummarySWC$ci.lower.swc, ymax = AverageSummarySWC$ci.upper.swc), 
                width = 0.5, position = position_dodge(width = 0.25)) +
 plotTheme1

swc.boxplot = swc %>% ggplot() +
  geom_boxplot(aes(date, SWC, group = interaction(date, group), fill = group),outliers = F) +
  labs(x = 'Date',
       y = 'Soil Water Content (%)',
       fill = 'Treatment') +
plotTheme1

swc.boxplot
## Warning: Removed 1746 rows containing non-finite outside the scale range
## (`stat_boxplot()`).

# save boxplot
#ggsave(filename = 'Exp1_swc_boxplot.pdf', path = output.dir, plot = swc.boxplot)

ANOVA

# ANOVA of soil water content by group
anova.swc = aov(SWC ~ group, data = swc)
summary(anova.swc)
##              Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value Pr(>F)  
## group         9   1395  154.98   2.393  0.012 *
## Residuals   380  24611   64.76                 
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 1746 observations deleted due to missingness
TukeyHSD(anova.swc)
##   Tukey multiple comparisons of means
##     95% family-wise confidence level
## 
## Fit: aov(formula = SWC ~ group, data = swc)
## 
## $group
##            diff        lwr        upr     p adj
## M-L -1.27692308  -7.077096  4.5232498 0.9995019
## N-L -1.20000000  -7.000173  4.6001728 0.9997003
## O-L  2.79743590  -3.002737  8.5976087 0.8773051
## P-L  1.88717949  -3.912993  7.6873523 0.9899039
## Q-L  3.33333333  -2.466839  9.1335062 0.7163509
## R-L -2.71025641  -8.510429  3.0899164 0.8967119
## S-L -1.50000000  -7.300173  4.3001728 0.9982009
## T-L  0.50769231  -5.292481  6.3078651 0.9999998
## U-L  1.09743590  -4.702737  6.8976087 0.9998571
## N-M  0.07692308  -5.723250  5.8770959 1.0000000
## O-M  4.07435897  -1.725814  9.8745318 0.4341903
## P-M  3.16410256  -2.636070  8.9642754 0.7740986
## Q-M  4.61025641  -1.189916 10.4104292 0.2560487
## R-M -1.43333333  -7.233506  4.3668395 0.9987415
## S-M -0.22307692  -6.023250  5.5770959 1.0000000
## T-M  1.78461538  -4.015557  7.5847882 0.9932716
## U-M  2.37435897  -3.425814  8.1745318 0.9526406
## O-N  3.99743590  -1.802737  9.7976087 0.4630929
## P-N  3.08717949  -2.712993  8.8873523 0.7984477
## Q-N  4.53333333  -1.266839 10.3335062 0.2785356
## R-N -1.51025641  -7.310429  4.2899164 0.9981027
## S-N -0.30000000  -6.100173  5.5001728 1.0000000
## T-N  1.70769231  -4.092481  7.5078651 0.9951471
## U-N  2.29743590  -3.502737  8.0976087 0.9615303
## P-O -0.91025641  -6.710429  4.8899164 0.9999706
## Q-O  0.53589744  -5.264275  6.3360703 0.9999997
## R-O -5.50769231 -11.307865  0.2924805 0.0789135
## S-O -4.29743590 -10.097609  1.5027369 0.3543646
## T-O -2.28974359  -8.089916  3.5104292 0.9623469
## U-O -1.70000000  -7.500173  4.1001728 0.9953084
## Q-P  1.44615385  -4.354019  7.2463267 0.9986498
## R-P -4.59743590 -10.397609  1.2027369 0.2597159
## S-P -3.38717949  -9.187352  2.4129933 0.6969552
## T-P -1.37948718  -7.179660  4.4206856 0.9990718
## U-P -0.78974359  -6.589916  5.0104292 0.9999913
## R-Q -6.04358974 -11.843763 -0.2434169 0.0333482
## S-Q -4.83333333 -10.633506  0.9668395 0.1975211
## T-Q -2.82564103  -8.625814  2.9745318 0.8705868
## U-Q -2.23589744  -8.036070  3.5642754 0.9677115
## S-R  1.21025641  -4.589916  7.0104292 0.9996786
## T-R  3.21794872  -2.582224  9.0181215 0.7563087
## U-R  3.80769231  -1.992481  9.6078651 0.5361975
## T-S  2.00769231  -3.792481  7.8078651 0.9843676
## U-S  2.59743590  -3.202737  8.3976087 0.9187768
## U-T  0.58974359  -5.210429  6.3899164 0.9999993
# show only significant differences
tidy(TukeyHSD(anova.swc)) %>% filter(adj.p.value <= 0.05)
## # A tibble: 1 × 7
##   term  contrast null.value estimate conf.low conf.high adj.p.value
##   <chr> <chr>         <dbl>    <dbl>    <dbl>     <dbl>       <dbl>
## 1 group R-Q               0    -6.04    -11.8    -0.243      0.0333
